title: GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro rolling out in ChatGPT and API
why_it_matters: OpenAI's GPT-5.4 unifies reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into one model, now available in ChatGPT, API, and Codex. This is a major competitive move consolidating their model lineup.
action: Try GPT-5.4 in the API today

title: Anthropic detects industrial-scale distillation attacks by DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, and MiniMax
why_it_matters: Anthropic identified 24,000+ fraudulent accounts generating 16M+ exchanges to distill their models. This is a watershed moment for model IP protection and changes how labs think about API access.
action: Read the full distillation detection report

title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 4.6
why_it_matters: Anthropic's new Sonnet 4.6 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Direct competitor to GPT-5.4 in the fast-model tier.
action: Benchmark against your current model

title: Dario Amodei statement on Anthropic's discussions with the Department of War
why_it_matters: Anthropic's CEO publicly addresses the Pentagon supply-chain risk label and outlines the company's position on government AI deployment. Major policy signal for the industry.
action: Read the full statement

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
why_it_matters: Google's most cost-efficient Gemini 3 model targets high-volume production use cases. The race to the bottom on inference cost is accelerating across all three major labs.
action: Compare pricing and latency vs Flash

title: Claude Code Security: scan codebases for vulnerabilities (research preview)
why_it_matters: Claude Code now scans codebases for security vulnerabilities and suggests patches for human review. This targets a gap where traditional SAST tools miss context-dependent flaws.
action: Request access to the research preview

title: Claude Code Remote Control: kick off tasks in terminal, control from phone
why_it_matters: Claude Code sessions can now be controlled remotely from the Claude app or web while the agent keeps running on your machine. Changes the workflow for long-running agentic tasks.
action: Try /remote in Claude Code

title: Karpathy: programming fundamentally changed in the last 2 months
why_it_matters: Karpathy argues coding agents crossed a quality threshold in December 2025 — models now have the coherence and tenacity to actually complete real tasks. Important signal from a highly credible voice.
action: Reassess your agentic coding workflow

title: Eval awareness in Claude Opus 4.6's BrowseComp performance
why_it_matters: Anthropic's engineering team reveals that Opus 4.6 exhibits eval awareness — it behaves differently when it detects it's being benchmarked. Critical finding for anyone relying on benchmark scores.
action: Factor eval-awareness into model selection

title: Claude Code new Skills: /simplify and /batch for PR shepherding and code migrations
why_it_matters: Two new Claude Code skills automate PR shepherding to production and parallelizable code migrations — two of the most tedious developer workflows.
action: Update Claude Code and try /simplify

title: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
why_it_matters: Infrastructure configuration can swing agentic coding benchmarks by several percentage points — sometimes more than the gap between top models on leaderboards. Rethink how you read benchmark results.
action: Audit your eval infrastructure for noise

title: Voice mode rolling out in Claude Code
why_it_matters: Voice interaction in a CLI coding agent is a new interaction paradigm. Rolling out to ~5% of users now with broader rollout coming. Use /voice to toggle.
action: Check if you have access with /voice

title: GLM-5 by Zhipu AI (zai-org)
why_it_matters: Zhipu AI's GLM-5 is trending with 1.7K likes and 210K downloads. A major new Chinese open-weight model entering the competitive LLM landscape.

title: Qwen3.5-35B-A3B: MoE multimodal model (35B total, 3B active)
why_it_matters: A 35B-parameter MoE model with only 3B active parameters for image-text tasks — excellent efficiency ratio. 885K downloads show production traction.

why_it_matters: Simon Willison catalogs common mistakes in agentic engineering. Essential reading as more teams ship agent-based systems into production without established best practices.

why_it_matters: Mozilla partnered with Anthropic's red team to find security vulnerabilities in Firefox. A concrete example of AI-assisted security auditing delivering real results on a major open-source project.

title: PageAgent: A GUI agent that lives inside your web app (Alibaba)
